name: Women's Dress – Vivid Purple Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id="t23-img-clip"><rect x="0" y="220" width="1080" height="760"/></clipPath>
    <linearGradient id="t23-img-t" x1="0" y1="220" x2="0" y2="360" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="t23-img-b" x1="0" y1="820" x2="0" y2="980" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stop-opacity="0.95"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <rect x="0" y="0"   width="1080" height="220" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
  <rect x="0" y="980" width="1080" height="370" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="980" x2="1080" y2="980" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="56"   y="100" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="76" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_BRAND_WORD</text>
  <text x="56"   y="148" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="36" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.3" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_BRAND_SUB</text>
  <text x="1024" y="80"  text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_LOCATION</text>
  <text x="1024" y="104" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>
  <rect x="880" y="130" width="144" height="44" rx="22" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="952"  y="158" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>
  <rect x="0" y="220" width="1080" height="760" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.3"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#t23-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="0" y="220" width="1080" height="760" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="0" y="220" width="1080" height="140" fill="url(#t23-img-t)"/>
  <rect x="0" y="820" width="1080" height="160" fill="url(#t23-img-b)"/>
  <text x="56"   y="1076" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="112" fill="#FFFFFF"                    letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="56"   y="1180" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="112" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>
  <line x1="56" y1="1200" x2="1024" y2="1200" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="56"   y="1230" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL1</text>
  <text x="56"   y="1252" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL2</text>
  <text x="1024" y="1240" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="80" fill="#FFFFFF"                    letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="1024" y="1268" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>
  <line x1="56" y1="1284" x2="1024" y2="1284" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.12"/>
  <rect x="56" y="1298" width="440" height="36" rx="0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2"/>
  <text x="276" y="1322" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="22" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="600" y="1316" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>
</svg>

PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL2.label: Detail line 2
PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL2.default: SIZES XS · S · M · L · XL · XXL
